abilities.name: Hook Reach
abilities.description: Can strike and retaliate across a partially closed line.

abilities.name: River Brace
abilities.description: Defensive retaliations hit harder, steady the line, and stagger the attacker into the next round.

abilities.name: Lantern Volley
abilities.description: Hits harder while the lines are still opening and the lane is clear.

abilities.name: Kindling Barrage
abilities.description: Surviving targets are harried, losing formation and cohesion for the next exchanges.

abilities.name: Basin Pike
abilities.description: Holds partial engagement lanes without giving up the front.

abilities.name: Citadel Screen
abilities.description: Anchors the line, hardens allied cohesion, quickens supporting volleys, and punishes staggered breaches.

abilities.name: Reedline Backstab
abilities.description: Deals extra damage and builds attack momentum against harried or staggered enemies.

abilities.name: Clod Harriers
abilities.description: Lobs choking mire clods that harry surviving targets, loosen cohesion, and slow their response.

abilities.name: Bogplate Bulk
abilities.description: Dense hide and layered bogplate turn aside part of incoming ranged fire and keep the stack from buckling.

abilities.name: Canal Hook Finish
abilities.description: Cuts deeper into prey already slowed or weakened by the pack and snowballs the kill beat.

abilities.name: Bloodrush
abilities.description: Surges faster, strikes harder, and spikes battlefield momentum once prey is wounded or already under pack pressure.

abilities.name: Shard Brace
abilities.description: Planted crystal pavises harden retaliations and jolt the attacker out of rhythm.

abilities.name: Facet Ward
abilities.description: Layered mirror-glass keeps the stack from folding under ranged pressure and sustains the line once engaged.

abilities.name: Refraction Volley
abilities.description: Prepared firing tiers bend light into harsher volleys, especially into already-staggered targets.

abilities.name: Glare Splinters
abilities.description: Splinter flashes harry survivors, roughening their footing and fraying cohesion for the next exchange.

abilities.name: Mirror Step
abilities.description: Uses reflected lanes to cut through half-open gaps without losing tempo.

abilities.name: Facet Break
abilities.description: Cuts deeper into enemies already harried, staggered, or slipping toward a break.

abilities.name: Aurora Salvo
abilities.description: Relay-calibrated bolts hit hardest when the battery owns the lane and the target line is already disrupted.

abilities.name: Aurora Relay
abilities.description: A fixed relay lattice steadies nearby arrays, quickens allied volleys, and rewards holding ground.

abilities.name: Fordhook Reach
abilities.description: Hook poles keep crossing enemies at a bad angle.

abilities.name: Towpath Brace
abilities.description: Cadets fight harder when the lane is held for the next column.

abilities.name: Ember Pot Lanes
abilities.description: Thrown pots mark the lane and leave survivors scrambling.

abilities.name: Bargebow Arc
abilities.description: Heavy river bows punish enemies held in protected lanes.

abilities.name: Oath Bodyguard
abilities.description: Bailiffs turn compact formations into retaliation courts.

abilities.name: Ash Writ Stand
abilities.description: A defended oath line staggers attackers that try to break it.

abilities.name: Beacon Mark
abilities.description: Signal rites mark exposed enemies for cleaner follow-up fire.

abilities.name: Signal Priority
abilities.description: Beacon calls tighten nearby firing priorities.

abilities.name: Sluicefire Surge
abilities.description: The lock-bred beast hits hardest once a prepared lane starts to collapse.

abilities.name: Scalding Wake
abilities.description: A passing scorch leaves survivors disordered.

abilities.name: Court-Bell Anchor
abilities.description: The walking court bell makes compact allies harder to scatter.

abilities.name: Charter Toll
abilities.description: Enemies that commit into the bell line pay for the breach.

abilities.name: Reedsnare Cut
abilities.description: Snare hooks leave prey marked for the surrounding pack.

abilities.name: Mudglass Blind
abilities.description: Glass-mud pellets blur the target and lower its cohesion.

abilities.name: Bogplate Bulk
abilities.description: Layered wet plates shrug off missiles and hit harder in the scrum.

abilities.name: Ferrychain Snap
abilities.description: Chain lashes punish targets trying to hold a clean lane.

abilities.name: Pinning Chain
abilities.description: A caught stack loses formation while the pack closes.

abilities.name: Rot Chant
abilities.description: Sporewake chants deny clean recovery and invite wounded-prey attacks.

abilities.name: Gorefen Finish
abilities.description: Rippers carve into isolated, harried, or already-wounded prey.

abilities.name: Wounded-Prey Rush
abilities.description: The pack elite accelerates when a victim starts to fail.

abilities.name: Sovereign Trample
abilities.description: The bog apex turns wounded lines into rout pressure.

abilities.name: Drowning Fear
abilities.description: Its passing leaves prey shaken and easier to finish.

abilities.name: Shard Reflection
abilities.description: Facet shields blunt missiles and preserve cohesion around the array.

abilities.name: Facet Hold
abilities.description: A defended warding line kicks attackers out of rhythm.

abilities.name: Prism Focus
abilities.description: Focused rays improve against marked or staggered targets.

abilities.name: Reflected Opening
abilities.description: Duelists exploit broken timing rather than brute force.

abilities.name: Resonant Meter
abilities.description: The choir keeps adjacent arrays firing in sequence.

abilities.name: Discordant Note
abilities.description: A sour note staggers a target out of the timing cycle.

abilities.name: Array Carapace
abilities.description: Solar plates resist disruption while the strider projects a lane.

abilities.name: Lane Projector
abilities.description: Projected lanes help ranged allies keep their aim.

abilities.name: Aurora Battery
abilities.description: The heavy battery excels from prepared protected lanes.

abilities.name: Daybreak Array
abilities.description: The titan amplifies every disciplined firing sequence.

abilities.name: Sun-Crown Beam
abilities.description: A full-array beam punishes enemies already broken by resonance.

abilities.name: Bramble Seed
abilities.description: Seeded cuts leave the enemy tangled for the next exchange.

abilities.name: Rooted Stand
abilities.description: Seedcutters are better when holding prepared ground.

abilities.name: Thornwhip Reach
abilities.description: Whip-vines bind targets across a partial lane.

abilities.name: Briar Bind
abilities.description: Bound enemies lose clean exits and formation timing.

abilities.name: Mender Screen
abilities.description: Menders keep rooted formations coherent through long exchanges.

abilities.name: Sporeglass Wards
abilities.description: Seedglass charms soften ranged disruption.

abilities.name: Barkmantle Hide
abilities.description: Layered bark shrugs off arrows while the ram breaks fixed lines.

abilities.name: Living Ram Stand
abilities.description: A planted ram is hard to shove out of the lane.

abilities.name: Bramble Leap
abilities.description: Stag-knots strike hardest through tangled or harried lanes.

abilities.name: Pinned-Prey Bound
abilities.description: They accelerate once a target is caught or wounded.

abilities.name: Graft Command
abilities.description: Matriarchs make surrounding regrowth lines harder to scatter.

abilities.name: Thorn Toll
abilities.description: Ignoring the matriarch leaves a target bound and exposed.

abilities.name: Worldroot Wall
abilities.description: A living fortress turns ranged pressure into bark-scarred noise.

abilities.name: Root Law
abilities.description: Nearby allies hold formation while the bastion occupies the lane.

abilities.name: Work-Gang Brace
abilities.description: Haulers lock shields and tools when ordered to hold.

abilities.name: Scrip Plate
abilities.description: Issued plates blunt arrows better than they hit back.

abilities.name: Rivet Tear
abilities.description: Clockwork hounds find weak seams in marked armor.

abilities.name: Gauge Bite
abilities.description: A biting gauge mark exposes poor footing.

abilities.name: Furnace Pavis
abilities.description: Heavy shields keep engines and crews intact.

abilities.name: Pavis Wall
abilities.description: The teams give artillery a harder front to fire behind.

abilities.name: Boiler Cast
abilities.description: Short-range rivet volleys punish clustered and staggered targets.

abilities.name: Steam Scald
abilities.description: Escaping steam breaks formation around the impact.

abilities.name: Overdue Collection
abilities.description: Exactors overheat into burst damage when a line is already failing.

abilities.name: Debt Engine Casing
abilities.description: The engine casing resists missiles while pressure builds.

abilities.name: Crucible Lob
abilities.description: Siege crucibles reward setup and punish broken formations.

abilities.name: Slag Wash
abilities.description: Molten slag leaves a stack struggling to reform.

abilities.name: Furnace Benediction
abilities.description: The saint hardens nearby engines and steadies their fire.

abilities.name: Sainted Hull
abilities.description: A sanctified furnace hull refuses most clean missile angles.

abilities.name: Fogside Oar
abilities.description: Bellwake crews hit from bad angles when a victim is marked.

abilities.name: Fog Screen
abilities.description: Mist and oarwork make clean ranged shots less reliable.

abilities.name: Lantern Blind
abilities.description: Funeral lanterns mark and blur a target for isolation.

abilities.name: Maskglass Cut
abilities.description: Corsairs punish blinded, marked, or isolated targets.

abilities.name: Boarding Rush
abilities.description: A faltering enemy line invites a sudden boarding strike.

abilities.name: Undertow Pull
abilities.description: Harpoons drag formation pieces out of place.

abilities.name: Tethered Shot
abilities.description: Harpoon volleys hit harder once a target is marked.

abilities.name: Obituary Clause
abilities.description: The written death weakens answers and lowers cohesion.

abilities.name: Bell Ledger
abilities.description: Scribes steady fragile crews by naming the next victim.

abilities.name: Mirror-Keel Phase
abilities.description: Reavers slip through fog lanes to hit marked backs.

abilities.name: Backline Wake
abilities.description: A weakened or marked line opens a route for the next phase strike.

abilities.name: Leviathan Fogbank
abilities.description: The leviathan drowns a section of the line in panic and mist.

abilities.name: Black-Sail Hide
abilities.description: Fog-slick bulk makes clean answers unreliable.

abilities.name: Pikehook Stand
abilities.description: Roadwardens hold toll lanes with hooked polearms and can answer a partially closed line.

abilities.name: Warning Shot
abilities.description: Hearthbow crews pepper advancing lines to break formation before the toll guards close.

abilities.name: Scented Rush
abilities.description: Kennel runners accelerate when prey is wounded or thrown off rhythm.

abilities.name: Glassmoss Hide
abilities.description: Layered mossglass plates blunt arrows and keep the sentinel steady in close lanes.

abilities.name: Hooked Sky-Pike
abilities.description: Roost wardens use hooked pikes to hold narrow ridges from a half step away.

abilities.name: High Arc Stones
abilities.description: Windglass slingers punish exposed lines from above the pass.

abilities.name: Dock-Pole Reach
abilities.description: Barge crews hold muddy approaches with long hooked dock poles.

abilities.name: Lantern Net
abilities.description: Weighted lantern nets foul footing and break formation in the reeds.

abilities.name: Fungus Buckler Wall
abilities.description: Layered fungus shields soak arrows and hold their shape in cramped tunnels.

abilities.name: Sporelamp Burst
abilities.description: Glass lamps scatter choking spores that loosen a clean advance.

abilities.name: Dust Sprint
abilities.description: Dustjacks surge hardest once a line is wounded or knocked out of step.

abilities.name: Crank-Bow Volley
abilities.description: Salvaged crank-bows hit harder across open badland lanes.

abilities.name: Kiln Door Brace
abilities.description: Mallet crews brace behind kiln plates and stagger attackers on the counterblow.

abilities.name: Cinderpot Smoke
abilities.description: Clay cinderpots burst into hot smoke that scatters formation.

abilities.name: Ice Road Pike
abilities.description: Bothy pikes hold long snow roads without yielding the crossing.

abilities.name: White-Lane Mark
abilities.description: Snowglass shots strike cleanly when the target is exposed on open ground.

abilities.name: Hedgerow Brace
abilities.description: Seasonal halberds lock shields against the hedge and punish a forced push.

abilities.name: Millstone Chips
abilities.description: Slingers chip at knees and shields until the enemy line loses order.

abilities.name: Hedgehook Cut
abilities.description: Watch crews strike harder when prey is already slowed in the thorns.

abilities.name: Thornbow Prick
abilities.description: Short thornbows pin loose armor and slow a clean response.

abilities.name: Low-Tide Cut
abilities.description: Cutters exploit staggered footing around wet stones and shallows.

abilities.name: Reefbolt Line
abilities.description: Heavy shore bolts punish targets that cannot find cover on the beach.

abilities.name: Switchback Reach
abilities.description: Guide pikes hold hairpin turns from a half-closed lane.

abilities.name: Cairnshield Load
abilities.description: Porters stack travel shields into a dense wall against missile fire.

abilities.name: Salt-Hide Bucklers
abilities.description: Salt-cured bucklers blunt arrows and keep haulers upright in glare.

abilities.name: Suncrack Flask
abilities.description: Bright flasks burst into grit and glare that disrupt shield order.

abilities.name: Sumpstone Plate
abilities.description: Sumpstone guards carry wet crystal plates that deflect poor shots.

abilities.name: Echo-Dart Pattern
abilities.description: Dart casts bounce shots through tunnel angles into exposed ranks.

abilities.name: Snare-Hook Finish
abilities.description: Icehook trappers hit hardest when prey is already slowed or wounded.

abilities.name: Whitepike Hold
abilities.description: Keepers extend pikes over snow banks and broken deadfall.

abilities.name: Scarshield Lock
abilities.description: Veterans lock scarred shields and stagger attackers against the glass line.

abilities.name: Ashdart Veil
abilities.description: Fine ash darts leave targets coughing and out of cadence.

abilities.name: Woven Branch Guard
abilities.description: Woven greenwood shields catch light missiles and steady the cudgel line.

abilities.name: Sapwhistle Signal
abilities.description: Shrill whistles and resin darts disrupt enemy timing in the trees.

abilities.name: Boarding Pole
abilities.description: Pilot-house guards use boarding poles to control a half-open lane.

abilities.name: Signal-Flare Volley
abilities.description: Flaremast shots punish exposed ranks crossing an open landing.

abilities.name: Kitehook Sprint
abilities.description: Runners build speed when a wounded line starts to drift.

abilities.name: Ridgeflare Aim
abilities.description: Signal shots carry farther when fired down an exposed ridge.

abilities.name: Lantern Brace
abilities.description: Shielded lanterns hold a narrow tunnel and stagger attackers in the glare.

abilities.name: Glimmercap Needles
abilities.description: Needles tipped with tunnel sap break discipline without claiming a banner.

abilities.name: Bell-Mud Hide
abilities.description: Layered mud hides and broad mauls keep the croft line from buckling.

abilities.name: Peatflare Jar
abilities.description: Smoldering peat jars throw smoke and sparks through tight fen lanes.

abilities.name: Road File Drill
abilities.description: Buckler files steady nearby crews and make ranged support more reliable.

abilities.name: Cartbow Crank
abilities.description: Cart-mounted bows strike harder down a prepared road lane.

abilities.name: Iceplank Cut
abilities.description: Cutters punish wounded targets slipping across iced planks.

abilities.name: Skate-Lantern Toss
abilities.description: Sliding lanterns burst low and scatter clean formations.

abilities.name: Clamp Brace
abilities.description: Maul crews brace beside coal clamps and batter attackers out of rhythm.

abilities.name: Emberpack Burst
abilities.description: Packed coals burst into sparks that harry shield lines.

abilities.name: Basalt Mantlet
abilities.description: Basalt mantlets absorb poor shots and keep the gate line intact.

abilities.name: Marked Bolt Lane
abilities.description: Bolters fire through measured tunnel marks into exposed ranks.
